bgm_battle_default.notes: General battle cue for standard encounters. E minor 80bpm, strings+brass ostinato, snare pattern.

bgm_battle_boss.notes: Boss battle cue. D minor 92bpm, brass ostinato, heavy percussion, oppressive low bass.

bgm_camp.notes: Camp and recovery cue. G major 72bpm, piano melody, harp arpeggios, warm strings pad.

bgm_title.notes: Title screen cue. A minor 68bpm, bittersweet strings melody, choir pad.

bgm_cutscene_ch01.notes: Chapter one cutscene cue. A minor 64bpm, piano lead with strings doubling, chord pad.
